final:
// // This comment suggests the output is LOW when fewer than two inputs are HIGH
module top_module(
    input a,
    input b,
    input c,
    output reg out
);always @(*) begin
    if ((a & b) | (a & c) | (b & c)) begin
        out <= 1;
    end else begin
        out <= 0;
    end
end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This comment suggests the output is LOW when fewer than two inputs are HIGH
